codeReview.summary: The commit cleanly resolves the recorded switcher drift by tracking the previously untracked SwitcherRuntimeLogCaptureTests file and adding it to the OpenBurnBarTests sources build phase, with no unrelated production-code changes in scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Handoff procedure-evidence reporting is inconsistent with mission AGENTS requirements: the handoff sets followedProcedure=true but verification.commandsRun only records mission/AGENTS read evidence, not the full required startup-read evidence set.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md lines 44-54 require evidence for mission.md, AGENTS.md, features.json, .factory/services.yaml, .factory/library/architecture.md, and .factory/library/user-testing.md, with followedProcedure=false required when any are missing. Handoff file (2026-04-10T02-42-45-956Z__misc-stabilize-switcher-working-tree-drift__abcce7e4-8d54-45c1-8e23-fd41e864be0d.json) lines 14-27 only include mission/AGENTS read evidence plus test commands, while line 103 sets followedProcedure to true.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton and commit 791ea95a3c32ce18ea05e4a7fffca8a75a5e8985; implementation is in-scope and passes feature intent for switcher drift stabilization, with no code-level blocking issues found.
